title: ursinia heterodonta
intro: Ursinia heterodonta, also known as the small daisy bush or yellow buttons, is a small, daisy-like flowering shrub native to South Africa. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it useful in treating skin conditions such as eczema and wounds. The health benefits of Ursinia heterodonta include reducing inflammation, promoting wound healing, and protecting against bacterial and fungal infections. Herbal preparations of Ursinia heterodonta often include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used topically or taken orally to harness its medicinal properties.
